title: Slepydawn
description: A new reimagination of Hypixel Skyblock with 3D models. Deprecated
body:
# Slepydawn 
A **new and original** texturepack for Hypixel Skyblock that changes the look of Hypixel Skyblock to represent my vision of the game! It's currently W.I.P., so some textures may be missing. If you have any issues with the pack, feel free to join [The Official Slepydawn Discord Server!](https://discord.gg/paB8Jas8BP) 
- This pack requires [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M5.jar) to work
- Please use [NEU](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughupdates) for the custom skull helmets!!
# Preview of some items (the rest is in the gallery)
